title: Brooding Eyes
writer: Pierre Gendron, John Goodwin, Mary Alice Scully
actors: Lionel Barrymore, Ruth Clifford, Robert Ellis
plot: Slim Jim Carey, the leader of a criminal gang, is in reality a nobleman called Lord Talbois, and his daughter is the rightful heir to the family estate. When "Slim Jim"'s gang finds out about this, they conspire to cheat her out o...
